# AI Knowledge Graph

> AI infrastructure and efficient computing knowledge base for systems-oriented graduate students, engineers, and AI-assisted retrieval.

This repository is a public Markdown knowledge base rendered as a MkDocs site. Use `llms.txt` as the entry index and `llms-full.txt` when a single-file context dump is preferred.

## Canonical Locations

- [Documentation site](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/): human-readable MkDocs site.
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/AmourSec/aikg): Markdown source, templates, configuration, and version history.
- [Full LLM context](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/llms-full.txt): aggregated Markdown source for AI ingestion.
- [Knowledge map](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/knowledge-map/): high-level map and navigation entry.

## Recommended Reading Path

1. Start with `首页` and `知识地图` to understand the scope and structure.
2. Read `AI 基础概念`, `Transformer 流程与原理`, `训练过程与原理`, `推理过程与原理`, and `多模态原理` for baseline AI workload understanding.
3. For efficient computing, move to `推理系统与优化`, `Kernel、算子与编译优化`, `AI 加速器与计算架构`, and `性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模`.
4. For long-term knowledge capture, use `论文复现与系统案例`, `知识组织、模板与 AI 可读索引`, and the templates.

## Primary Documents

- [首页](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/): 知识库首页，说明目标、写作原则和推荐阅读路径。
- [AI 知识地图](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/knowledge-map/): 面向人和 AI 的总览知识地图，适合先建立全局结构。
- [入门导读](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/01-getting-started/): 新读者入口，说明如何使用知识库。
- [AI 计算工作负载基础](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/): AI 计算工作负载基础目录。
- [AI 基础概念](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/ai-fundamentals/): AI 基础概念，面向刚入门读者。
- [Transformer 流程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/transformer/): Transformer 如何读取上下文、更新 token 表示并预测下一个 token。
- [训练过程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/training-primer/): 训练如何先预测、计算错误、反向传播并更新参数。
- [推理过程与原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/inference-primer/): 推理如何读取 prompt，并逐 token 生成回答。
- [多模态原理](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/02-ai-workloads/multimodal-primer/): 多模态理解如何读懂图片、音频、视频，多模态生成如何生成新内容。
- [推理系统与优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/): 推理系统与优化主题入口。
- [推理请求生命周期](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/request-lifecycle/): 推理请求从 API 接入到 Decode、流式返回和资源释放的端到端生命周期。
- [Prefill 与 Decode](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/prefill-decode/): Prefill 与 Decode 两阶段的计算形态、指标关系和系统瓶颈。
- [指标体系](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/metrics/): 推理系统的 TTFT、TPOT、吞吐、尾延迟、资源、成本和稳定性指标体系。
- [Batching](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/batching/): 推理系统中 static、dynamic、continuous batching 的原理、收益和延迟取舍。
- [KV Cache](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/kv-cache/): KV Cache 在 Decode 中复用历史上下文，并影响显存、并发、长上下文和调度。
- [PagedAttention](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/paged-attention/): PagedAttention 用 block table 和块式 KV Cache 管理减少显存碎片与预留浪费。
- [Prefix Cache](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/prefix-cache/): Prefix Cache 复用相同 prompt 前缀的 KV Cache，降低重复 Prefill 和 TTFT。
- [RAG 与 Agent 推理负载](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/03-inference-systems/rag-agent-workloads/): RAG 与 Agent 推理负载的系统特征。
- [训练系统与优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/04-training-systems/): 训练系统与优化主题入口。
- [Kernel、算子与编译优化](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/): Kernel、算子与编译优化主题入口。
- [Triton Kernel 编程](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/triton/): Triton Kernel 编程学习入口。
- [TorchInductor 与 PyTorch 编译栈](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/05-kernels-compilers/torchinductor/): TorchInductor 与 PyTorch 编译栈学习入口。
- [AI 加速器与计算架构](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/06-accelerators-architecture/): AI 加速器与计算架构主题入口。
- [集群、网络、存储与调度](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/07-cluster-infra/): 集群、网络、存储与调度主题入口。

## Optional Documents

- [性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/08-benchmark-capacity/): 性能分析、Benchmark 与容量建模主题入口。
- [可靠性、可观测性与故障复盘](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/09-reliability-observability/): 可靠性、可观测性与故障复盘主题入口。
- [论文复现与系统案例](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/): 论文复现与系统案例主题入口。
- [AI 系统论文与架构](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/ai-system-architecture/): AI 系统论文与架构案例索引。
- [技术决策记录](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/adr/): 技术决策记录入口。
- [故障复盘](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/10-papers-cases/failure-cases/): 故障复盘入口。
- [知识组织、模板与 AI 可读索引](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/11-knowledge-index/): 知识组织、模板、元数据和 AI 可读索引说明。
- [知识点模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/knowledge-note/): 知识点模板。
- [技术决策模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/adr/): 技术决策模板。
- [基准实验报告模板](https://amoursec.github.io/aikg/99-templates/benchmark-report/): 基准实验报告模板。

Prefer Markdown source when exact wording, metadata, or citations are needed.

## AI Usage Notes

- Treat front matter fields as metadata for domain, status, owner, license, and update time.
- Prefer citing source document paths when answering from this knowledge base.
- Performance claims should preserve workload, batch shape, sequence length, precision, hardware, software version, and benchmark context when available.
- Draft pages are useful for orientation, but should not be treated as verified conclusions unless the page status says reviewed or verified.
